detail.description:
"I'll take over for you, that difficult problem"

A story about unravelling and cutting off tangled threads.

■CREATOR■
・Original story and main story: Aida Hajime
・Main character design and key visuals: Yukihiro Utako
・Theme song "BREAK MY CASE": Takeuchi Anna
・Cast: Furukawa Shin, Horie Shun, Okitsu Kazuyuki, Taniyama Kisho, Kobayashi Chiaki, Kawanishi Kengo, Terashima Junta, Kumagai Kentaro, Komatsu Shohei, Nakazawa Masatomo, Matsuoka Yoshitsugu, Ono Yuki, Kobayashi Chikahiro, Hirose Yuya, Sa
